title: Scouting & Talent Identification
bodyParagraph1: We actively scout youth and emerging talent across Ontario. Whether you're playing in a local league or a regional tournament, we're watching. If you have the drive and the skill, we want to find you.
bodyParagraph2: Our scouting network covers amateur leagues, school competitions, and regional tournaments throughout the province. Talent doesn't always come pre-packaged we find it where it grows.
